---
title: "REGSPASPAN"
author: "Daffa Faaiz Al-Zakkii"
date: "2026-05-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# ============================================================
# ANALISIS REGRESI DATA PANEL SPASIAL
# Variabel Respons (Y) : PM_2.5 (Konsentrasi Partikel Udara)
# Data              : 34 Provinsi Indonesia, Tahun 2023-2025
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# INSTALL & LOAD PACKAGE
# ============================================================
# Jalankan install.packages() jika belum terinstall:
# install.packages(c("readxl","dplyr","plm","spdep","spatialreg",
#                    "lmtest","randtests","car","ggplot2","sf","tidyr"))

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(plm)
library(spdep)
library(spatialreg)
library(lmtest)
library(randtests)
library(car)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(tidyr)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 0. KOORDINAT PROVINSI INDONESIA (Longitude, Latitude)
# ============================================================
# Koordinat centroid masing-masing provinsi (34 provinsi)
koordinat <- data.frame(
  Provinsi = c(
    "Aceh", "Sumatera Utara", "Sumatera Barat", "Riau", "Jambi",
    "Sumatera Selatan", "Bengkulu", "Lampung",
    "Kepulauan Bangka Belitung", "Kepulauan Riau",
    "DKI Jakarta", "Jawa Barat", "Jawa Tengah",
    "DI Yogyakarta", "Jawa Timur", "Banten", "Bali",
    "Nusa Tenggara Barat", "Nusa Tenggara Timur",
    "Kalimantan Barat", "Kalimantan Tengah",
    "Kalimantan Selatan", "Kalimantan Timur", "Kalimantan Utara",
    "Sulawesi Utara", "Sulawesi Tengah", "Sulawesi Selatan",
    "Sulawesi Tenggara", "Gorontalo", "Sulawesi Barat",
    "Maluku", "Maluku Utara", "Papua Barat", "Papua"
  ),
  Long = c(
    96.74, 98.67, 100.35, 101.45, 103.61,
    104.76, 102.34, 105.32,
    106.11, 104.03,
    106.82, 107.62, 110.22,
    110.43, 112.23, 106.06, 115.17,
    116.42, 121.07,
    113.94, 113.94,
    115.28, 117.14, 117.56,
    124.84, 121.44, 119.43,
    122.15, 122.47, 119.39,
    128.19, 127.81, 133.17, 138.04
  ),
  Lat = c(
    4.69, 2.08, -0.72, 0.51, -1.61,
    -3.32, -3.79, -4.56,
    -2.12, 3.95,
    -6.21, -6.92, -7.15,
    -7.87, -7.54, -6.40, -8.34,
    -8.65, -8.66,
    -0.13, -1.68,
    -3.09, 0.54, 3.01,
    1.49, -1.43, -3.66,
    -4.15, 0.55, -2.84,
    -3.24, 1.57, -1.34, -4.27
  ),
  ID = 1:34
)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 1. IMPORT & PERSIAPAN DATA
# ============================================================
setwd(".")   # Sesuaikan dengan direktori kerja Anda

# Baca masing-masing sheet
data2023 <- read_excel("AnregData.xlsx", sheet = "2023")
data2024 <- read_excel("AnregData.xlsx", sheet = "2024")
data2025 <- read_excel("AnregData.xlsx", sheet = "2025")

# Tambahkan kolom Tahun
data2023$Tahun <- 2023
data2024$Tahun <- 2024
data2025$Tahun <- 2025
```


```{r}
# Penyesuaian nama kolom DI Yogyakarta agar konsisten
data2025 <- data2025 %>%
  mutate(Provinsi = ifelse(Provinsi == "Daerah Istimewa Yogyakarta",
                           "DI Yogyakarta", Provinsi))

# Gabungkan semua tahun
data <- bind_rows(data2023, data2024, data2025)

# Tambahkan ID dan koordinat
data <- data %>%
  left_join(koordinat, by = "Provinsi") %>%
  arrange(ID, Tahun)
```


```{r}
head(data)
cat("Dimensi data:", nrow(data), "x", ncol(data), "\n")
cat("Jumlah provinsi:", n_distinct(data$Provinsi), "\n")
cat("Tahun:", unique(data$Tahun), "\n")
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 2. EKSPLORASI DATA
# ============================================================

# Boxplot Y per tahun
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
boxplot(data$PM_2.5[data$Tahun == 2023], main = "PM_2.5 2023", ylab = "PM_2.5")
boxplot(data$PM_2.5[data$Tahun == 2024], main = "PM_2.5 2024", ylab = "PM_2.5")
boxplot(data$PM_2.5[data$Tahun == 2025], main = "PM_2.5 2025", ylab = "PM_2.5")

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```


```{r}
# Boxplot masing-masing peubah penjelas
par(mfrow = c(2, 6))
boxplot(data$Pembakaran_Kayu,         main = "X1: Pembakaran Kayu")
boxplot(data$Jumlah_Panjang_Jalan,    main = "X2: Panjang Jalan")
boxplot(data$Jumlah_Hot_Spot,         main = "X3: Hot Spot")
boxplot(data$Kelembapan,              main = "X4: Kelembapan")
boxplot(data$Tekanan_Udara,           main = "X5: Tekanan Udara")
boxplot(data$Kecepatan_Angin,         main = "X6: Kec. Angin")
boxplot(data$Luas_Kebakaran_Hutan,    main = "X7: Luas Kbk Hutan")
boxplot(data$Kendaraan_Bermotor,      main = "X8: Kendaraan")
boxplot(data$Kepadatan_Penduduk,      main = "X9: Kepadatan")
boxplot(data$Curah_Hujan,             main = "X10: Curah Hujan")
boxplot(data$Suhu,                    main = "X11: Suhu")
boxplot(data$Jumlah_Perusahaan_Konstruksi, main = "X12: Perus. Konstruksi")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
```


```{r}
# Statistik deskriptif
summary(data[, c("PM_2.5", "Pembakaran_Kayu", "Jumlah_Panjang_Jalan",
                 "Jumlah_Hot_Spot", "Kelembapan", "Tekanan_Udara",
                 "Kecepatan_Angin", "Luas_Kebakaran_Hutan",
                 "Kendaraan_Bermotor", "Kepadatan_Penduduk",
                 "Curah_Hujan", "Suhu", "Jumlah_Perusahaan_Konstruksi")])
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 3. SCALING DATA
# ============================================================
vars_model <- c("PM_2.5", "Pembakaran_Kayu", "Jumlah_Panjang_Jalan",
                "Jumlah_Hot_Spot", "Kelembapan", "Tekanan_Udara",
                "Kecepatan_Angin", "Luas_Kebakaran_Hutan",
                "Kendaraan_Bermotor", "Kepadatan_Penduduk",
                "Curah_Hujan", "Suhu", "Jumlah_Perusahaan_Konstruksi")

data_scaled      <- scale(data[, vars_model])
datafix          <- cbind(data[, c("ID", "Provinsi", "Long", "Lat", "Tahun")],
                          as.data.frame(data_scaled))

head(datafix)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 4. UJI MULTIKOLINEARITAS
# ============================================================
reg <- lm(PM_2.5 ~ Pembakaran_Kayu + Jumlah_Panjang_Jalan + Jumlah_Hot_Spot +
            Kelembapan + Tekanan_Udara + Kecepatan_Angin + Luas_Kebakaran_Hutan +
            Kendaraan_Bermotor + Kepadatan_Penduduk + Curah_Hujan +
            Suhu + Jumlah_Perusahaan_Konstruksi,
          data = datafix)

vif_values <- vif(reg)
print(vif_values)
cat("\nCatatan: Peubah dengan VIF >= 10 perlu dipertimbangkan untuk dikeluarkan.\n")
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 5. ANALISIS DATA PANEL
# ============================================================
formula_model <- PM_2.5 ~ Pembakaran_Kayu + Jumlah_Panjang_Jalan +
  Jumlah_Hot_Spot + Kelembapan + Tekanan_Udara + Kecepatan_Angin +
  Luas_Kebakaran_Hutan + Kendaraan_Bermotor + Kepadatan_Penduduk +
  Curah_Hujan + Suhu + Jumlah_Perusahaan_Konstruksi
```


```{r}
# Model Common Effect (CEM / Pooled)
cem <- plm(formula_model, data = datafix, model = "pooling",
           index = c("ID", "Tahun"))
```


```{r}
# Model Fixed Effect (FEM)
fem <- plm(formula_model, data = datafix, model = "within",
           index = c("ID", "Tahun"))
```


```{r}
# Model Random Effect (REM)
rem <- plm(formula_model, data = datafix, model = "random",
           index = c("ID", "Tahun"))
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 6. UJI PEMILIHAN MODEL PANEL
# ============================================================

# -- Uji Chow: CEM vs FEM
cat("\n========== UJI CHOW (CEM vs FEM) ==========\n")
chow_test <- pFtest(fem, cem)
print(chow_test)
cat("Kesimpulan:", ifelse(chow_test$p.value < 0.05,
                          "Tolak H0 => Model FEM lebih baik dari CEM",
                          "Gagal tolak H0 => Model CEM lebih baik dari FEM"), "\n")
```


```{r}
# -- Uji Hausman: FEM vs REM
cat("\n========== UJI HAUSMAN (FEM vs REM) ==========\n")
hausman_test <- phtest(fem, rem)
print(hausman_test)
cat("Kesimpulan:", ifelse(hausman_test$p.value < 0.05,
                          "Tolak H0 => Model FEM lebih baik dari REM",
                          "Gagal tolak H0 => Model REM lebih baik dari FEM"), "\n")
```


```{r}
# -- Uji Lagrange Multiplier (jika REM yang terpilih dari Hausman)
cat("\n========== UJI LAGRANGE MULTIPLIER (Two-ways) ==========\n")
print(plmtest(cem, effect = "twoways", type = "bp"))
print(plmtest(cem, effect = "individual", type = "bp"))
print(plmtest(cem, effect = "time", type = "bp"))
```


```{r}
# -- Ringkasan model terpilih (sesuaikan berdasarkan hasil uji)
cat("\n========== RINGKASAN MODEL PANEL TERPILIH ==========\n")
# Ganti 'fem' dengan 'rem' atau 'cem' sesuai hasil uji di atas
model_panel <- rem
summary(model_panel)
cat("\nR-Squared model panel:", summary(model_panel)$r.squared["rsq"], "\n")
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 7. MATRIKS PEMBOBOT SPASIAL
# ============================================================
# Ambil koordinat unik per provinsi (35 unit spasial, 1 titik per provinsi)
longlat <- koordinat[, c("Long", "Lat")]

# -- k-NN (k=3)
knn    <- knearneigh(longlat, k = 3)
nb     <- knn2nb(knn, sym = TRUE)
w_knn  <- nb2listw(nb)
```


```{r}
# -- Invers Jarak
d      <- dist(longlat, method = "euclidean", diag = TRUE, upper = TRUE)
w1     <- as.matrix(1 / d)
diag(w1) <- 0
w_inv  <- mat2listw(w1, style = "W")
```


```{r}
# -- Eksponensial
w2     <- as.matrix(exp(-d))
diag(w2) <- 0
w_exp  <- mat2listw(w2, style = "W")
```


```{r}
# Pembobot untuk pengujian (menggunakan semua baris data panel)
longlat2 <- datafix[, c("Long", "Lat")]

knn2   <- knearneigh(longlat2, k = 3)
nb2    <- knn2nb(knn2, sym = TRUE)
w_knn2 <- nb2listw(nb2)

d2     <- dist(longlat2, method = "euclidean", diag = TRUE, upper = TRUE)
w1.2   <- as.matrix(1 / d2)
w1.2[!is.finite(w1.2)] <- 0
w_inv2 <- mat2listw(w1.2, style = "W")

w2.2   <- as.matrix(exp(-d2))
diag(w2.2) <- 0
w_exp2 <- mat2listw(w2.2, style = "W")
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 8. UJI AUTOKORELASI SPASIAL (Moran's I)
# ============================================================
cat("\n========== MORAN'S I (k-NN) ==========\n")
moran_knn <- moran.test(datafix$PM_2.5, listw = w_knn2)
print(moran_knn)

cat("\n========== MORAN'S I (Invers Jarak) ==========\n")
moran_inv <- moran.test(datafix$PM_2.5, listw = w_inv2)
print(moran_inv)

cat("\n========== MORAN'S I (Eksponensial) ==========\n")
moran_exp <- moran.test(datafix$PM_2.5, listw = w_exp2)
print(moran_exp)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 9. UJI KERAGAMAN SPASIAL (Breusch-Pagan)
# ============================================================
# Catatan: memerlukan koordinat sebagai SpatialPoints
library(sp)
datafix_sp <- datafix
coordinates(datafix_sp) <- c("Long", "Lat")

cat("\n========== UJI BREUSCH-PAGAN (Keragaman Spasial) ==========\n")
bp_test <- bptest(model_panel, ~ coordinates(datafix_sp))
print(bp_test)
cat("Kesimpulan:", ifelse(bp_test$p.value < 0.05,
                          "Tolak H0 => Terdapat keragaman spasial (Heteroskedastisitas Spasial)",
                          "Gagal tolak H0 => Tidak terdapat keragaman spasial"), "\n")
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 10. UJI PENGGANDA LAGRANGE (Pemilihan Model Spasial)
# ============================================================
cat("\n========== UJI LAGRANGE MULTIPLIER SPASIAL (k-NN) ==========\n")
lm_test_knn <- lm.LMtests(reg, listw = w_knn2, test = "all")
summary(lm_test_knn)

cat("\n========== UJI LAGRANGE MULTIPLIER SPASIAL (Invers Jarak) ==========\n")
lm_test_inv <- lm.LMtests(reg, listw = w_inv2, test = "all")
summary(lm_test_inv)

cat("\n========== UJI LAGRANGE MULTIPLIER SPASIAL (Eksponensial) ==========\n")
lm_test_exp <- lm.LMtests(reg, listw = w_exp2, test = "all")
summary(lm_test_exp)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# PANDUAN PEMILIHAN MODEL SPASIAL:
# - LMlag signifikan, LMerr tidak  => SAR (Spatial Autoregressive)
# - LMerr signifikan, LMlag tidak  => SEM (Spatial Error Model)
# - Keduanya signifikan => lihat RLMlag vs RLMerr (yang lebih kecil p-value)
#   atau gunakan SDM (Spatial Durbin Model)
# - SARMA: keduanya sekaligus
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# 11. ANALISIS SPASIAL PANEL - SPATIAL DURBIN MODEL (SDM)
# ============================================================
# Gunakan pembobot yang memberikan hasil signifikan pada uji LM
# Contoh menggunakan w_knn (sesuaikan dengan hasil uji Anda)
library(splm)
cat("\n========== SPATIAL DURBIN MODEL (SDM) ==========\n")
sdm <- spml(PM_2.5 ~ Pembakaran_Kayu + Jumlah_Panjang_Jalan +
              Jumlah_Hot_Spot + Kelembapan + Tekanan_Udara +
              Kecepatan_Angin + Luas_Kebakaran_Hutan +
              Kendaraan_Bermotor + Kepadatan_Penduduk +
              Curah_Hujan + Suhu + Jumlah_Perusahaan_Konstruksi,
            data    = datafix,
            listw   = w_knn,
            model   = "within",
            effect  = "individual",
            spatial.error = "b",
            spatial.lag   = "b")
summary(sdm)
```


```{r}
# R-Square SDM
rsq_sdm <- 1 - var(sdm$resid) / var(datafix$PM_2.5)
cat("R-Squared SDM:", round(rsq_sdm, 4), "\n")
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 12. UJI ASUMSI SISAAN SDM
# ============================================================
err_sdm <- sdm$residuals
```


```{r}
# -- Normalitas (Kolmogorov-Smirnov)
cat("\n========== UJI NORMALITAS SISAAN (KS Test) ==========\n")
ks_result <- ks.test(err_sdm, "pnorm",
                     mean = mean(err_sdm), sd = sd(err_sdm))
print(ks_result)
cat("Kesimpulan:", ifelse(ks_result$p.value > 0.05,
                          "Gagal tolak H0 => Sisaan berdistribusi Normal",
                          "Tolak H0 => Sisaan TIDAK berdistribusi Normal"), "\n")
```


```{r}
# QQ-Plot
qqnorm(err_sdm, main = "QQ-Plot Sisaan SDM")
qqline(err_sdm, col = "red")
```


```{r}
# -- Kehomogenan Ragam (Glejser Test)
cat("\n========== UJI KEHOMOGENAN RAGAM (Glejser) ==========\n")
datafix$error_sdm <- abs(err_sdm)
glejser_sdm <- lm(error_sdm ~ Pembakaran_Kayu + Jumlah_Panjang_Jalan +
                    Jumlah_Hot_Spot + Kelembapan + Tekanan_Udara +
                    Kecepatan_Angin + Luas_Kebakaran_Hutan +
                    Kendaraan_Bermotor + Kepadatan_Penduduk +
                    Curah_Hujan + Suhu + Jumlah_Perusahaan_Konstruksi,
                  data = datafix)
summary(glejser_sdm)
cat("Kesimpulan:", ifelse(summary(glejser_sdm)$fstatistic[1] > 0 &
                            pf(summary(glejser_sdm)$fstatistic[1],
                               summary(glejser_sdm)$fstatistic[2],
                               summary(glejser_sdm)$fstatistic[3],
                               lower.tail = FALSE) > 0.05,
                          "Ragam homogen (Homokedastisitas)",
                          "Ragam tidak homogen (Heterokedastisitas)"), "\n")
```


```{r}
# -- Kebebasan Sisaan (Runs Test)
cat("\n========== UJI KEBEBASAN SISAAN (Runs Test) ==========\n")
runs_result <- runs.test(err_sdm)
print(runs_result)
cat("Kesimpulan:", ifelse(runs_result$p.value > 0.05,
                          "Gagal tolak H0 => Sisaan saling bebas (tidak ada autokorelasi)",
                          "Tolak H0 => Sisaan TIDAK bebas (ada autokorelasi)"), "\n")
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 13. ROBUST SDM (M-Estimator) — Jika asumsi sisaan tidak terpenuhi
# ============================================================
# Jalankan bagian ini jika uji asumsi (normalitas / homogenitas) ditolak

cat("\n========== ROBUST SDM (M-Estimator Bisquare) ==========\n")

# Moran plot sisaan SDM
moran.plot(sdm$residuals, w_knn2,
           main = "Moran Plot Sisaan SDM",
           xlab = "Sisaan", ylab = "Lag Spasial Sisaan")

robust.SDM <- function(X, y, bobot, rho) {
  n <- length(y)
  k <- ncol(X)
  bo <- rep(1, n)
  X  <- cbind(bo, X)
  X  <- as.matrix(X)
  p  <- k + 1
  c  <- 4.685
  I  <- diag(rep(1, n))
  W  <- rho * bobot
  W  <- as.matrix(W)
  V  <- I - W
  yb <- V %*% y

  # Step 1: Delta awal
  delta_awal <- solve(crossprod(X, X), tol = 1e-20) %*% t(X) %*% yb
  cat("Nilai delta awal:\n"); print(delta_awal)

  # Step 2: Residual awal
  yhat     <- W %*% y + X %*% delta_awal
  residual <- y - yhat

  # Step 3: Iterasi IRLS
  s        <- median(abs(residual - median(residual))) / 0.6745
  u        <- residual / s
  u_abs    <- abs(u)
  w        <- ifelse(u_abs > c, 0, (1 - (u / c)^2)^2)
  Wr       <- diag(as.vector(w), n)
  WX       <- Wr %*% X
  delta    <- solve(crossprod(X, WX), tol = 1e-20) %*% t(X) %*% Wr %*% yb
  a        <- 0

  repeat {
    con <- abs(delta - delta_awal) / abs(delta_awal + 1e-10)
    if (all(con <= 0.01)) {
      cat("\n=== ITERASI SELESAI ===\n")
      break
    }
    a          <- a + 1
    cat("\n*** ITERASI", a, "***\n")
    delta_awal <- delta
    ytopi      <- W %*% y + X %*% delta_awal
    residual   <- y - ytopi
    s          <- median(abs(residual - median(residual))) / 0.6745
    u          <- residual / s
    u_abs      <- abs(u)
    w          <- ifelse(u_abs > c, 0, (1 - (u / c)^2)^2)
    Wr         <- diag(as.vector(w), n)
    WX         <- Wr %*% X
    delta      <- solve(crossprod(X, WX), tol = 1e-20) %*% t(X) %*% Wr %*% yb
  }

  # Step 5: MSE
  v         <- ifelse(w == 0, 1, 0)
  bobot_nol <- sum(v)
  H         <- X %*% solve(crossprod(X, WX), tol = 1e-20) %*% t(X) %*% Wr
  SSE       <- t(yb) %*% t(I - H) %*% Wr %*% (I - H) %*% yb
  db        <- n - k - 1 - bobot_nol
  MSE       <- SSE / db

  # Step 6-7: R-Square
  wjumlah   <- sum(diag(Wr))
  wy        <- sum(w * y)
  ywbar     <- wy / wjumlah
  SST       <- sum(w * (y - ywbar)^2)
  Rsquare   <- 1 - (SSE / SST)
  Adj.Rsq   <- 1 - ((n - 1) / (n - k - 1)) * (1 - Rsquare)

  # Step 8: Uji F
  SSR  <- SST - SSE
  MSR  <- SSR / k
  Fhit <- MSR / MSE
  sig_F <- 1 - pf(Fhit, k, db)

  # Step 9: Uji Wald
  Wy       <- bobot %*% y
  Z        <- cbind(Wy, X)
  WZ       <- Wr %*% Z
  var_delta <- diag(solve(crossprod(Z, WZ), tol = 1e-20)) * MSE
  Zb       <- data.frame(rho, t(delta_awal))
  par_est  <- t(Zb)
  wald     <- par_est^2 / var_delta
  sig_wald <- 1 - pchisq(wald, 1)
  wald_tab <- cbind(par_est, var_delta, wald, sig_wald)
  colnames(wald_tab) <- c("delta", "var_delta", "Wald", "Sig.")

  cat("\nMSE:\n");              print(MSE)
  cat("\nR-Square:\n");         print(Rsquare)
  cat("\nAdj. R-Square:\n");    print(Adj.Rsq)
  cat("\nF hitung:\n");         print(cbind(Fhit, sig_F))
  cat("\nWald hitung:\n");      print(wald_tab)

  return(list(
    Koefisien    = par_est,
    Uji_Wald     = wald_tab,
    R.Square     = Rsquare,
    Adj.RSq      = Adj.Rsq,
    Uji.F        = cbind(Fhit, sig_F),
    MSE          = MSE,
    Residuals    = residual,
    Pred         = y - residual
  ))
}

# Persiapan input Robust SDM
y_vec   <- datafix[, "PM_2.5"]
x_mat   <- datafix[, c("Pembakaran_Kayu", "Jumlah_Panjang_Jalan",
                        "Jumlah_Hot_Spot", "Kelembapan", "Tekanan_Udara",
                        "Kecepatan_Angin", "Luas_Kebakaran_Hutan",
                        "Kendaraan_Bermotor", "Kepadatan_Penduduk",
                        "Curah_Hujan", "Suhu", "Jumlah_Perusahaan_Konstruksi")]
bobot   <- listw2mat(w_knn2)
lagX    <- create_WX(x_mat, w_knn2, prefix = "lag")
x_lag   <- cbind(x_mat, lagX)

# Ambil nilai rho dari SDM
rho_sdm <- sdm$coefficients["rho"]   # atau sesuaikan nama setelah cek summary(sdm)

rsdm <- robust.SDM(x_lag, y_vec, bobot, rho = rho_sdm)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 14. UJI ASUMSI SISAAN ROBUST SDM
# ============================================================
res_rsdm <- rsdm$Residuals

cat("\n========== NORMALITAS SISAAN Robust SDM ==========\n")
ks_rob <- ks.test(res_rsdm, "pnorm",
                  mean = mean(res_rsdm), sd = sd(res_rsdm))
print(ks_rob)

qqnorm(res_rsdm, main = "QQ-Plot Sisaan Robust SDM")
qqline(res_rsdm, col = "blue")

cat("\n========== KEHOMOGENAN RAGAM Robust SDM (Glejser) ==========\n")
datafix$err_rob <- abs(res_rsdm)
glejser_rob <- lm(err_rob ~ Pembakaran_Kayu + Jumlah_Panjang_Jalan +
                    Jumlah_Hot_Spot + Kelembapan + Tekanan_Udara +
                    Kecepatan_Angin + Luas_Kebakaran_Hutan +
                    Kendaraan_Bermotor + Kepadatan_Penduduk +
                    Curah_Hujan + Suhu + Jumlah_Perusahaan_Konstruksi,
                  data = datafix)
summary(glejser_rob)

cat("\n========== KEBEBASAN SISAAN Robust SDM (Runs Test) ==========\n")
runs_rob <- runs.test(res_rsdm)
print(runs_rob)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# 15. INTERPRETASI KOEFISIEN ROBUST SDM
# ============================================================
cat("\n========== KOEFISIEN ROBUST SDM ==========\n")
print(rsdm$Koefisien)
cat("\nUji Signifikansi Wald:\n")
print(rsdm$Uji_Wald)

cat("\n--- Peubah yang signifikan (alpha = 5%) ---\n")
sig_vars <- rsdm$Uji_Wald[rsdm$Uji_Wald[, "Sig."] < 0.05, ]
print(sig_vars)

cat("\n--- Ringkasan ---\n")
cat("R-Square        :", round(rsdm$R.Square, 4), "\n")
cat("Adj. R-Square   :", round(rsdm$Adj.RSq, 4), "\n")
cat("MSE             :", round(rsdm$MSE, 4), "\n")
```
